title: Clytostomanthus decorus

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds and fever. The bioactive constituents of Clytostomanthus decorus include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties.
